heading: National Credit Union Administration Central Liquidity Facility; establishment; management; jurisdiction
label: 1795b National Credit Union Administration Central Liquidity Facility; establishment; management; jurisdiction
text: There is created the National Credit Union Administration Central Liquidity Facility. The Central Liquidity Facility, an instrumentality of the United States, shall exist within the National Credit Union Administration and be managed by the Board. The United States district court shall have original jurisdiction over any case to which the Board on behalf of the Facility is a party, without regard to the amount in controversy.
